name: spinner
description: A busy indicator with role=status and an accessible label; respects prefers-reduced-motion. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the spinner partial to your JTE root at lievit/spinner.jte, reached as @template.lievit.spinner(size=..., label=...). The source is yours: edit freely.
